description: A reader should fail sync when the seed replaces advertised heads and then requests a view that was only reachable from the withdrawn root set.

assertions.description: Reader rejects WANT because replace=true withdrew the old sync roots before the stale view object was requested again.
Reader does not keep writing sync state after the withdrawn-root view WANT violation.

notes: Extends the simulator matrix with a post-HELLO root-set replacement fault on the VIEW_ANNOUNCE optional-message path.
The harness keeps the normal view-capable peer-store transcript but injects a replacing HEADS plus a stale view WANT before BYE.
